title: Rape-accused abandons bail
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The two men, aged 27...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The two men, aged 27 and 31, who are accused of the rape of a 25-year-old woman in Asla Park have both abandoned their bail applications during their latest court appearance on Tuesday 27 January.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The two men, aged 27 and 31, who are accused of the rape of a 25-year-old woman in Asla Park have both abandoned their bail applications during their latest court appearance on Tuesday 27 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The case has been ongoing since their arrest shortly after the incident took place in September last year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The KwaNonqaba Police Station’s spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, previously told Mossel Bay Advertiser that the woman had allegedly received a lift from one of the accused after a party in the early hours of 26 September, and that he took her to his home where he and his friend allegedly raped her.","html":"The KwaNonqaba Police Station’s spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, previously told Mossel Bay Advertiser that the woman had allegedly received a lift from one of the accused after a party in the early hours of 26 September, and that he took her to his home where he and his friend allegedly raped her."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The men will reappear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court on 26 February.","html":"The men will reappear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court on 26 February."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles: "},{"type":"list","items":["Two arrested in connection with Asla Park rape","Bail applications under way for Asla Park rape-accused"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
